reference: I have a lump on the bottom of my sternum. A chest X-ray and ultrasound showed a lump, but they were unable to see the edges of it. They said I will need a magnetic resonance imaging scan to see exactly what it is. I am concerned because I have had severe pain in that area for months. Please help.
text: I have a lump on the bottom of my sternum. A chest X-ray and ultrasound showed a lump, but they were unable to see the edges of it. They said I will need a magnetic resonance imaging scan to see exactly what it is. I am concerned because I have had severe pain in that area for months. Please help.
